description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 4, 2026 at 8:34 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on Market Street near Noe Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northeast in the second from the left northeast lane on Market Street in a queue of traffic for a red light 
at the intersection with Noe Street. While the Waymo AV was stopped, a passenger car that was initially stopped directly behind the 
Waymo AV proceeded to pass the Waymo AV on the left, and the rear right side of the passenger car made contact with the rear left side of 
the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The passenger car 
sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
